title: Jharkhand Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 772 Home Guard Posts
description: Jharkhand Home Guard has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 772 Home Guard Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 08th, 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the Jharkhand Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online on or before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, h...
